description: Heavy rainfall triggered landslide blocking Murree-Islamabad road. Vehicles trapped.
social_signals_to_inject: Murree road pe pahar se mitti gir gayi. Raasta bilkul band. 20+ gaariyan phansi hain!
Landslide on Murree-Islamabad road near Bari Imam. Complete blockage.
Zamin khisak gayi Murree road pe. Log phanse hue hain. NHA kab action lega?
Heavy rocks on road between Murree and Islamabad. Road impassable. Rescue needed.

expected_response.reroute: GT Road via Rawat to Rawalpindi alternate
